description:
Every enum parser is duplicated between orchestrator-cli/shared/parsing.rs and orchestrator-web-api/services/web_api_service/parsing.rs with nearly identical match arms but different error types:

Duplicated parsers (each exists 2x):
- parse_task_status, parse_task_type_opt, parse_priority_opt, parse_dependency_type
- parse_project_type_opt (15+ string aliases, character-for-character identical)
- parse_requirement_priority, parse_requirement_status, parse_requirement_type_opt

Behavioral divergences caused by duplication:
- Web API uses normalize_enum_key (replaces _ with -); CLI uses separate "in_progress" match arms
- Web API accepts 11 RequirementStatus values; CLI only accepts 5

Also: CLI re-defines CliSuccessEnvelope, CliErrorBody, CliErrorEnvelope privately instead of using orchestrator-web-contracts exports. WebApiError is structurally identical to CliErrorBody with no From impl.

Solution: Add FromStr and Display impls on all domain enums in orchestrator-core/types.rs. Delete all private parse_* functions. Add From<WebApiError> for CliErrorBody. Import shared envelope types.
title: Unify CLI and Web API enum parsing into shared FromStr/Display impls
